AI Perfume Recommendation System | Github | Live                                                                               Feb’ 25 – Apr’ 25
•	Designed an interactive and responsive UI that ensures a smooth, consistent experience across all devices, including desktops, tablets, and smartphones
•	Integrated the Gemini API to enhance recommendation accuracy by analysing and matching user preferences with detailed perfume attributes for more relevant suggestions.
•	Built a fully functional web-based Perfume Recommendation System that provides personalized fragrance suggestions based on user inputs such as gender, occasion, mood, liking, and price range.
•	Tech stacks: HTML, JavaScript, data processing, API Development

 Social Network – A book sharing platform | Github                                                                       Aug’ 23 – Dec’ 23
•	Developed features that enabled users to easily search for and discover books based on preferred genres and interests, ensuring a smooth and personalized browsing experience.
•	Created a dedicated space where book lovers could connect, share their reads, and engage in a community. Facilitated meaningful user interaction by allowing readers with similar tastes to discuss, connect & discover new of    new titles of various books recommended by others through shared interests.
•	Crafted the platform, focusing on a user-friendly interface that made navigation effortless for book enthusiasts.
•	Tech stacks: HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
